overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist navigating an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character ascends from a narrow alley through a rooftop tannery district to a waterfront shipyard, with atmospheric torchlight illuminating historic stone architecture against a deep blue night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairway between plastered buildings

events.description: NPC in white tunic appears and begins following the player character up the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs in a narrow passage between weathered plastered walls, moving toward an opening above

notable_agents.action: civilian in white tunic walking behind the player character up the staircase

entered.detail: wide stone steps ascending between buildings
weathered white plaster walls with wooden beams
wall-mounted iron torch holder with burning flame
large dark wooden barrel sitting against the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow courtyard with stone stairs leading upward between weathered plastered walls. The player character ascends the stairs while torchlight casts warm shadows on the walls. A civilian NPC appears behind the character and follows them up the staircase toward the opening above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air tannery with stone dyeing vats and wooden drying racks

events.description: exits narrow stairway into open rooftop tannery area with large stone dyeing vats

agents.ego_description: walking through the tannery district, navigating between large stone dyeing vats filled with colored liquids and wooden structures

entered.detail: large circular stone basins containing red and blue dyes
rough wooden poles and planks forming drying structures
wooden frames with stretched hides or fabrics
dense cluster of ancient stone buildings with flat roofs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairway, the scene opens into a wide rooftop tannery area filled with large stone vats containing colored dyes. Wooden scaffolding and drying racks line the area, with the city visible in the distance under the night sky. The character walks steadily through this industrial zone, passing various processing pits.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront quay with ancient ships docked along the canal

events.description: descends from tannery to waterfront promenade along the water's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone quay beside the water, passing docked ancient ships and approaching a large stone bridge

entered.detail: large wooden galley with multiple oars and furled sails docked at the quay
wide stone walkway along the water's edge
calm water reflecting the night sky and surrounding structures
massive stone bridge with multiple arches spanning the waterway
tall stone column with statue atop visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfront and walks along the stone quay beside a calm water canal. An ancient trireme ship is docked to the right, while a grand stone bridge with arches spans the water ahead. The sky shows the first hints of dawn light breaking over the distant city monuments.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient shipyard with wooden crane mechanisms beneath stone bridge

events.description: enters shipyard area with large wooden wheel crane and passes beneath stone bridge arches
lighting becomes darker and more orange as character moves under the bridge overhang with wall torches

agents.ego_description: navigating through the shipyard, passing large wooden crane mechanisms and approaching a dark tunnel entrance under the bridge

entered.detail: massive wooden treadwheel crane used for lifting ship cargo, with ladder and spokes
dark arched passage leading under the bridge with wooden supports
oil lamps suspended from chains providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a shipyard dominated by a massive wooden wheel crane used for moving ship cargo. The character walks along cobblestones beneath a large stone bridge with multiple arches, passing from open sky into a darker, torch-lit area under the bridge toward a tunnel entrance. The environment shifts from natural moonlight to warm artificial torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a confined urban courtyard into an expansive industrial rooftop before descending toward a torch-lit shipyard at dawn. It begins by following the character up a narrow stone staircase between weathered walls, where warm torchlight casts deep shadows as a civilian follows closely behind. As the character emerges from the stairs, the scene opens into a wide rooftop tannery filled with stone dye vats and wooden scaffolding, revealing the distant city skyline under a deep night sky. The movement then shifts toward the waterfront, gliding along a stone quay beside a docked trireme and a grand arched bridge as the first hints of dawn light break over the horizon. Finally, the camera passes beneath the massive arches of the bridge and a wooden cargo crane, transitioning from the open moonlight into a darker, torch-lit shipyard area leading toward a tunnel entrance.
